note: Datadog per-host monthly rates (annual billing) plus log/span volume rates. Datadog uses a high-water-mark host model (measures hourly, drops top 1%, bills the next highest). APM Pro ~$31-35/host, Enterprise ~$40/host; Infrastructure ~$15/host. Cross-check the source before any billing decision.

sources.what: Datadog pricing by product and billing unit
APM $31/host including 1M indexed spans; real-world cost scenarios
